connection.offlineAria: Gulaalaan haala sarara alaatti fayyadamaa jira; kana jechuun kan gulaalu si qofa
connection.onlineAria: Gulaalaan karaa {type} haala waliin hojjechuu keessa jira; URL qooddee namoota biroo waliin gulaaluu dandeessa
connection.switchOfflineAria: Gulaallii waliin hojjechuu dhaamsiitii gara haala sarara alaatti jijjiiri
connection.switchWebRTCAria: Gara gulaallii waliin hojjechuu WebRTC jijjiiri
connection.switchWebSocketAria: Gara gulaallii waliin hojjechuu WebSocket jijjiiri

share.downloadActiveFileInfo: Downloads only the currently open file
share.collaborationLinkTooltip: Faankishinii kana dura galmee kana fork godhi
share.embedCodeAria: Koodii keessa galchuu koorsii ammaa gulaalaa keessatti argadhu
share.externalResourceAria: URL galmee alaa gulaalaa waliin qooduudhaaf fayyadami
share.githubGistLinkTooltip: Faankishinii kana dura faayilii kana gara GitHub Gist erguu qabda
share.githubGistLinkAria: Koorsii LiaScript ergaa GitHub Gist duraanii irraa fe'i
share.dataUriAria: Koorsii ammaa LiaScript irratti qoodi, qabiyyeen isaa URL keessatti galfamee
share.fileUrlTooltip: Faankishiniin kun qabeenya alaa yoo qoodde qofa ni jira
share.downloadZip: Pirojektii guutuu akka faayilii ZIP buusi
share.githubGistAria: Galmee GitHub irratti akka gist kuusi
share.githubGistTooltip: Faankishinii kana dura galmee kana fork godhi
share.nostrLinkTooltip: You have to publish this file to Nostr before you can use this functionality
share.nostrLinkAria: Load the LiaScript course from a previous Nostr publication
share.exporterAria: Send the whole project to a LiaScript Exporter to convert it to SCORM, PDF, APK, ...
share.exporterTooltip: Hand the entire project to a local or remote LiaScript Exporter for conversion
share.githubRepoFileTooltip: Open the active file as a LiaScript course from the linked GitHub repository (push your changes first). Only available for GitHub-linked projects.

modal.collaborationBody: Yoo hidhaa armaan gadii qoodde, gulaalaan haala waliin hojjechuu keessatti ni banama. Sarara alaatti hojjechuunis danda'amuu qaba, garuu fayyadamtoonni walitti hidhaman hundi koorsii tokko irratti hojjetu. Yoo kana hidhaa waliin hojjechuu irraa argatte fi koorsii haaraa guutummaatti ofii keetiin uumuu barbaadde, cuqaasa "Fork" tuqi; kunis gosa haaraa guutuu uuma.
modal.externalResourceBody: URL kana fayyadamuun qabiyyee hidhaa qooduu kee dursee murteessi. Haala kana keessatti gulaalaan jalqaba faayilii Markdown fe'uu fi qabiyyee isaa gulaalaa keessatti galchuu ni yaala. Hidhaan kun faayiliin Markdown kee interneetiin yoo argamuu danda'e qofa hojjeta.
modal.dataProtocolBody: Qabiyyeen koorsii guutuun Base64 yookaan URI tiin koodii ta'ee data-URI keessatti kaa'ama. Base64 afaanota muraasa irratti kufuu waan danda'uuf, URL URI-koodii ta'es ni uumama. Garuu kun koorsii gabaabaa irratti qofa hojjeta; koorsiin yoo dheerate URI'nis ni dheerata. Fakkeenyaaf gulaalaa ergaa raabsituu irratti yoo qooddu, kutaan tokkollee akka hin muramne dursee mirkaneessi. Akkasumas browseroonni adda addaa dheerina URL adda addaa deeggaru... (Gosa gabaabaa filadhu)
modal.snapshotBody: Suuraawwan yeroodhaa URL ibsa koorsii guutuu of keessaa qabanidha. Garuu kun koorsii gabaabaa irratti qofa hojjeta; koorsiin yoo dheerate URL nis ni dheerata. Fakkeenyaaf gulaalaa ergaa raabsituu irratti yoo qooddu, kutaan tokkollee akka hin muramne dursee mirkaneessi. Akkasumas browseroonni adda addaa dheerina URL adda addaa deeggaru...
modal.embedBody: Koodii HTML kana gara marsariitii keetti waraabi, koorsii kana akka fakkeenyaatti keessa galchi. Filannoon, URL kana keessaa tokkoon jijjiirtee gulaalaa yookaan durargii kallattiin banuu dandeessa:

prompt.shareFileUrl: maaloo URL faayilii Markdown qooduu barbaaddu galchi

examples.footer: Kun gulaalaa toora interneetii irratti waliin hojjetamu kan {liascript} ti. Qabiyyeen hundi browser kee keessatti qofa kuufama. {templates} keessa galfamuu danda'an yookaan {courses} duraan maxxanfaman barbaadi.

index.footer: Kun gulaalaa toora interneetii irratti waliin hojjetamu kan {liascript} ti. Qabiyyeen hundi browser kee keessatti qofa kuufama. Yaada yoo barbaadde, {examples} keenya ilaali, {templates} keessa galfamuu danda'an yookaan {courses} duraan maxxanfaman barbaadi.

import.heading: Import from
import.title: Create a new project
import.newDesc: Start with a blank document and write from scratch.
import.uploadDesc: Pick a Markdown file or a ZIP archive from your device.
import.githubDesc: Import the files of a public GitHub repository.
import.urlDesc: Load a Markdown file or ZIP archive from a web link.
import.gistDesc: Import all files of a GitHub Gist into a new project.
import.localFolderDesc: Open a folder on your computer (Chrome / Edge only).
import.githubHint: Pick the files to import on the next screen.
import.urlHint: Loads a Markdown file or a ZIP archive into a new project.
import.gistHint: Imports all files of the gist into a new project.

errors.generic: Import failed. Please check your input and try again.
errors.invalidRepo: Could not recognise a GitHub repository in that input.
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
errors.invalidGist: Could not find a gist for that ID.
errors.fetchFailed: Could not load the resource. Check the URL and your connection.

card.deleteConfirm: Galmee kana bara baraan haquu barbaadda?

toast.compileHint: Koorsii kana {ctrl} tiin jijjiiruu fi kompaa'ilii gochuu dandeessa, garuu jijjiirama kee yeroo hundaaf kuusuu yoo barbaadde fork gochuu qabda!
toast.compileHintEmbed: Koorsii kana {ctrl} tiin jijjiiruu fi kompaa'ilii gochuu, yookaan {link} keessatti banuu dandeessa.
toast.compileHintEmbedOnly: Koorsii kana {ctrl} tiin jijjiiruu fi kompaa'ilii gochuu dandeessa
toast.viewOnLiaScript: Koorsii LiaScript irratti arguu yoo barbaadde, {here} tuqi.
toast.toolbarHint: Haala gulaalaa fi durargii gidduutti jijjiiruuf sarara meeshaalee fayyadami.

github.badCredentials: Ragaa seensaa sirrii miti, fuulli irra deebi'ee fe'ama

menu.importTooltip: Import files from a GitHub repository
menu.pushTooltip: Commit and push changes to the linked repository
menu.pullTooltip: Fetch changes from the linked repository
menu.publishTooltip: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files

import.title: Import from GitHub
import.repoHint: Public repositories can be imported without a token.
import.truncated: This repository is very large; the file list was truncated by GitHub.
import.emptyRepo: This repository is empty. An empty README.md will be created to start your project.

push.title: Push to GitHub
push.remoteDrift: The repository changed on GitHub since your last sync. Consider pulling first; unchanged remote files are preserved.

pull.title: Pull from GitHub
pull.upToDate: Your project is up to date with GitHub.

pat.intro: Add a Personal Access Token (PAT) to raise the rate limit and to access private repositories or push changes.
pat.howtoToggle: How do I create a token?
pat.step2: Choose a name and an expiration, then select the repositories you want to use.
pat.step3Write: Under "Repository permissions" set "Contents" to "Read and write".
pat.step4: Generate the token, copy it and paste it below.

errors.badUrl: Please enter a valid repository (owner/repo or a GitHub URL).
errors.notFound: Repository, branch or file not found.
errors.network: Could not reach GitHub. Please check your connection.

publish.title: Publish to a new repository
publish.intro: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files into it.

nostr.title: Karaa Nostr qoodi
nostr.publicKeyHint: Furtuun ummataa kee network Nostr irratti si adda baasuuf fayyada.
nostr.privateKeyHint: Furtuun dhuunfaa kee mallatteessuu fi maxxansuuf barbaachisa. Nageenyaan eegi.
nostr.storeCredentials: Ragaa seensaa browser kana keessatti kuusi
nostr.storeCredentialsWarning: Furtuu dhuunfaa browser keessatti kuusuun salphaa dha, garuu nageenya xiqqaa qaba.
nostr.relayHint: Sarvaroota relay qabiyyeen kee irratti maxxanfamu galchi (tokko tokkoon sarara).
nostr.rememberRelays: Relay kana maxxansa gara fuulduraatiif yaadadhu
nostr.saveKeyWarningBody: Furtuun dhuunfaa kun eenyummaa Nostr keetti seenuu kenna. Nageenyaan kuusi.
nostr.intro: Koorsii kee hawaasa Nostr waliin qoodi. Kallattiin maxxansuu yookaan dursee maxxansa kee sirreessuu dandeessa.
nostr.embedMedia: Faayiloota miidiyaa akka data URI keessa galchi
nostr.embedMediaHint: Suura, sagalee fi viidiyoo gara data URI keessa galfameetti jijjiira, akka salphaatti darbuuf.
nostr.messagePlaceholder: Ergaa maxxansa Nostr kee waliin deemu dabali...
nostr.alertGenerateFailed: Cimdi furtuu uumuu hin dandeenye. Maaloo irra deebi'i.
nostr.alertMissingKeys: Maaloo maxxansuu dura furtuu ummataa fi dhuunfaa kee lamaanuu galchi.
nostr.alertMissingRelay: Maaloo yoo xiqqaate sarvarii relay tokko galchi.
nostr.alertPublishFailed: Network Nostr irratti maxxansuun hin milkoofne. Maaloo irra deebi'i.
nostr.alertMissingPrivateKey: Maxxansa mallatteessuu fi maxxansuuf furtuu dhuunfaa kee galchi.

toolbar.noPreview: Gosa faayilii kanaaf durargiin hin jiru.

exporter.title: LiaScript Exporter
exporter.urlHint: Start the exporter locally with 'liaex serve', or enter the address of a hosted exporter. The project is sent to this server and converted there.
exporter.resendTitle: Send the current project to the exporter again
exporter.handed: Project handed to the exporter. Choose a format/preset below and start the export.
exporter.errorInvalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please enter a full address, e.g. http://localhost:3000
exporter.errorMixedContent: This editor runs over HTTPS and cannot embed an insecure HTTP exporter (except localhost). Please use an HTTPS exporter URL.
exporter.errorNoHandshake: Could not reach the exporter. Make sure it is running ('liaex serve') and reachable at this URL, and that it allows being embedded.
exporter.errorNoProject: No active project found to export.
exporter.errorSend: Failed to package and send the project.

menu.openTooltip: Link a folder on your computer to this project
menu.syncTooltip: Compare and sync this project with the linked folder

sync.title: Synchronize with local folder
sync.inSync: Editor and folder are already in sync.

errors.noFolder: No folder is linked to this project yet.
errors.permission: Access to the folder was denied. Please grant permission to continue.
